examples: The police ordered the men to come out barehanded .
In those days they had to fight the pests barehanded.
Incredible as it seems, live high voltage transmission lines can be worked barehanded.
Berman has covered stories ranging from the war in Iraq to the best way to catch catfish barehanded.
Jose Iglesias singled and Ciriaco followed with a bunt that Reynolds barehanded cleanly, but he rushed his throw and the ball skipped out of play, allowing both runners to advance.
